steps.observed: 404 Not Found - provider endpoint not reachable
404 Not Found - gateway service not deployed

assertions.title: Gateway denies unauthenticated or forged callers

assertions.title: Upstream provider failure is isolated per sandbox

steps.action: Cause provider failure for one sandbox, verify other sandbox unaffected
steps.expected: Sandbox A failure does not affect Sandbox B

assertions.issues: Cannot test failure isolation - prerequisite gateway service not available.

blockers.description: Gateway service (port 8084) not deployed or not responding on Node B. All /provider/* routes return 404.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tested multiple endpoints: /provider/v1/inference, /provider/health, /auth/health, /api/health. All return 404. Frontend SPA loads correctly (built assets served), indicating Caddy is running but backend services are not deployed or not healthily responding.

blockers.description: Auth service (port 8081) also not responding on /auth/* routes, returning 404.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 9 blocked. The gateway-vm milestone backend services (gateway, auth) are not deployed or not healthy on https://draft.choir-ip.com. Frontend SPA serves correctly, but all backend API endpoints return 404.
